name: CLOSED: Vegetarian in the Golden Age
description: Vegetarian Buddhist restaurant serving Asian and western food with mock meats. Nice and clean. Owners speak basic English and meals are sizable. Buffet served from 11am-2pm daily. The only place outside Vietnam found serving typical western pho style meals, vermicelli with tofu, sprouts, shredded carrots, cucumber, herbs and mock fish sauce, and spring rolls with peanut sauce. Also offers fruit shakes, various seasoned vegetables, and appetizers, soups. Reported closed August 2024.

                                    Vegetarian Buddhist restaurant serving Asian and western food with mock meats. Nice and clean. Owners speak basic English and meals are sizable. Buffet served from 11am-2pm daily. The only place outside Vietnam found serving typical western pho style meals, vermicelli with tofu, sprouts, shredded carrots, cucumber, herbs and mock fish sauce, and spring rolls with peanut sauce. Also offers fruit shakes, various seasoned vegetables, and appetizers, soups. Reported closed August 2024.

bukrie



 

Points +515

Vegan








 

















 



 



 



 



 



25 Apr 2024


                    Master Ruma                    
 - Edit






                        
                        Sabaidee, warm greetings from Indonesia! 🇮🇩

This restaurant might be the biggest and most comprehensive vegan restaurant in Vientiane Capital.

It's not just about the food; they also have a pretty big minimarket.

For food, they offer a buffet package priced at 70,000 kip per person with an all-you-can-eat concept.

Friendly staff will welcome you when you enter here. They seem to be nuns from Laos or other countries.

Best wishes for your success always.

Khob chai!

JunkyardOtter



 

Points +490

Vegan








 

















 



 



 



 



 



26 Feb 2023


                    Good vegetarian food, cheap, not Buddhist                     
 - Edit






                        
                        This is a nice vegetarian restaurant (mostly vegan; I believe they serve dairy in some of the drinks) with very cheap food that comes quick. They have quite a large menu with a lot of options to choose from. I found the fried stuff (like spring rolls) to be a bit oily, but I liked everything else. Good fresh juices as well.

They also do a lunch buffet, which is a solid value. But it's good at any time of day. Staff is very attentive and generally kind, but they don't speak much English. The menu does have English, however.

I think it's worth clarifying that, contrary to the other reviews and information here, this is not a Buddhist restaurant. It's actually run by a cult, built around a man named Master Ruma. The atmosphere here is very much centered on their leader; when I visited, there was a huge portrait of him on one wall, another wall covered in shelves stuffed with his books and videos, and other images of him scattered throughout. I found this pretty offputting, but still, the staff don't try to directly push it on you in any way.                        
                    
Read more

Momo_moon



 

Points +1164

Vegetarian








 

















 



 



 



 



 



07 Oct 2022


                    Amazing Vegetarian Buffet                     
 - Edit






                        
                        One of my favourite vegetarian restaurants in town. They have a great vegetarian buffet (40K) per person from 11-2pm. Late afternoon-evening is the regular menu. Different variations of foods they put out each day, with ice tea and sometimes fruit juices. 


The service here is amazing, it restaurant is run of nuns and they are very welcoming and friendly. If you have any questions, they are always there to help. 


They also have a shop next door if you're staying more long term and want to cook food. Many mock meats. vegetarian foods you can cook and products to use. 


Highly recommend this place for any vegetarian lover.                        
                    
Read more


Pros: Buffet, Many variations of foods, Healthy and delicious

JunkyardOtter



 

Points +490

Vegan








 

















 



 



 



 



 



26 Feb 2023


                    Good vegetarian food, cheap, not Buddhist                     
 - Edit






                        
                        This is a nice vegetarian restaurant (mostly vegan; I believe they serve dairy in some of the drinks) with very cheap food that comes quick. They have quite a large menu with a lot of options to choose from. I found the fried stuff (like spring rolls) to be a bit oily, but I liked everything else. Good fresh juices as well.

They also do a lunch buffet, which is a solid value. But it's good at any time of day. Staff is very attentive and generally kind, but they don't speak much English. The menu does have English, however.

I think it's worth clarifying that, contrary to the other reviews and information here, this is not a Buddhist restaurant. It's actually run by a cult, built around a man named Master Ruma. The atmosphere here is very much centered on their leader; when I visited, there was a huge portrait of him on one wall, another wall covered in shelves stuffed with his books and videos, and other images of him scattered throughout. I found this pretty offputting, but still, the staff don't try to directly push it on you in any way.                        
                    
Read more

Vegetarian








 

















 



 



 



 



 



07 Oct 2022


                    Amazing Vegetarian Buffet                     
 - Edit






                        
                        One of my favourite vegetarian restaurants in town. They have a great vegetarian buffet (40K) per person from 11-2pm. Late afternoon-evening is the regular menu. Different variations of foods they put out each day, with ice tea and sometimes fruit juices. 


The service here is amazing, it restaurant is run of nuns and they are very welcoming and friendly. If you have any questions, they are always there to help. 


They also have a shop next door if you're staying more long term and want to cook food. Many mock meats. vegetarian foods you can cook and products to use. 


Highly recommend this place for any vegetarian lover.                        
                    
Read more


Pros: Buffet, Many variations of foods, Healthy and delicious
